sections.content: Looking at the image, I can see the black shape has moved left. Now the yellow shape is showing through the black shape's holes more prominently. Let me check the segmentation to see the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5 and n['color'] not in ('b', 'S'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  WHITE: id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] < 40:
        print(f"  YELLOW: id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

print(f"\nTimer yellow: {seg['nodes'][1]['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
